Container.Name: modelship
Container.Overview:
Self-hosted, OpenAI-compatible inference for the agentic era. Modelship runs your whole AI stack -- reasoning LLMs with universal tool calling, embeddings, speech-to-text, text-to-speech, and image generation -- as multiple models sharing your GPUs (or CPU) behind a single OpenAI-compatible gateway. Built on Ray Serve with pluggable backends (vLLM, llama.cpp, Diffusers, plugins).
This template defaults to the GPU image and requires the NVIDIA Driver plugin + NVIDIA Container Toolkit. For a CPU-only install: change Repository's tag from ":latest" to ":latest-cpu", and remove "--runtime=nvidia" plus the NVIDIA_VISIBLE_DEVICES / NVIDIA_DRIVER_CAPABILITIES variables below.
IMPORTANT: create your models.yaml at the path below BEFORE starting the container -- it will not start without one. See https://github.com/alez007/modelship/blob/main/docs/model-configuration.md and https://github.com/alez007/modelship/tree/main/config/examples for the format and ready-made examples.
IMPORTANT: the default --shm-size=2g in Extra Parameters is sized only for a single small quick-start model. Ray sizes its object store to roughly 30% of the RAM it sees as available AT STARTUP -- if --shm-size is smaller than that, Ray crashes immediately. Raise --shm-size (roughly 30% of the RAM you want to give modelship) for bigger or multi-model / GPU stacks.
Container.Requires: GPU variant (default) needs the NVIDIA Driver plugin and NVIDIA Container Toolkit. For CPU-only hosts, switch the Repository tag to ":latest-cpu" and drop the NVIDIA-specific Extra Parameters/variables.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: OpenAI-compatible API port (chat completions, embeddings, STT, TTS, images)

Config.Name: Metrics Port
Config.Description: Prometheus metrics scrape port (Ray cluster, Ray Serve, vLLM, and modelship:* metrics). Only useful if Metrics Enabled is true.

Config.Name: Models Config
Config.Description: Your models.yaml defining which models to run, on GPU or CPU. MUST exist before first start or the container will exit. See docs/model-configuration.md and config/examples/ in the modelship repo for the format.

Config.Name: Model Cache
Config.Description: Persistent cache for downloaded model weights (HuggingFace, vLLM, plugins). Keep this outside the container so weights survive updates/restarts.

Config.Name: HF_TOKEN
Config.Description: HuggingFace access token, required only for gated models (e.g. Llama, Gemma, Mistral variants).

Config.Name: MSHIP_API_KEYS
Config.Description: Comma-separated API keys clients must send as 'Authorization: Bearer <key>'. Leave empty to disable auth (fine for a LAN-only deployment).

Config.Name: MSHIP_LOG_LEVEL
Config.Description: Log verbosity: TRACE, DEBUG, INFO, or WARNING.

Config.Name: MSHIP_METRICS
Config.Description: Enable Prometheus metrics on the Metrics Port. Set to false to disable.

Config.Name: NVIDIA_VISIBLE_DEVICES
Config.Description: Which GPUs to expose to the container (GPU variant only). 'all', or a comma-separated list of GPU UUIDs/indices.

Config.Name: NVIDIA_DRIVER_CAPABILITIES
Config.Description: NVIDIA driver capabilities exposed to the container (GPU variant only).
